headline: Backrooms is a certified blockbuster with a $38 million opening day
summary: Kane Parsons' film "Backrooms" secured a massive $38 million on its opening Friday. It's projected to hit $90 million for its opening weekend, far exceeding expectations. This opening obliterates A24's previous record, outperforming "Civil War" and "The Mandalorian."

headline: Welcome to Night Vale host Cecil Baldwin shares his tech pet peeves
summary: Cecil Baldwin, known for "Welcome to Night Vale," shared his personal tech frustrations. Baldwin's diverse background includes voice acting in "Gravity Falls" and theater. The popular podcast blends Lovecraftian horror with absurdist elements.

headline: Microsoft is threatening legal action for disclosing exploits
summary: Microsoft faces backlash for its response to zero-day exploit disclosures. A user named Nightmare Eclipse publicly posted proof-of-concept exploit code. Microsoft is reportedly threatening legal action against those disclosing vulnerabilities.

headline: Two of our favorite art TVs are more than 40 percent off this weekend
summary: Woot is offering significant discounts on Samsung Frame and Hisense CanvasTV models. The 65-inch Hisense CanvasTV is at its lowest price of the year, $779.99. Art TVs, usually expensive, are now available with over 40 percent off until June 26th.

headline: Everything Coming to Netflix in June 2026
summary: Netflix is set to release a new slate of content for June 2026. The lineup features titles like "Karate Kid," "Riddick," and "Rocky." June brings a "wedding season" theme to the streaming service's offerings.

headline: Rayman Origins Remaster Leak Reveals First Details About Enhanced Edition from Ubisoft
summary: A leak on the Xbox Store suggests a "Rayman Origins Remaster" is in development. The enhanced edition appears to be from Ubisoft, revealing new details. The leaked listing notably showed an unusual price of $2,000.

headline: The Best Deals Today: LEGO R2-D2, Neon Genesis Evangelion Blu-ray, M5 MacBook Air, and More
summary: Today's top deals include discounts on a LEGO R2-D2 set. Fans can find sales on the "Neon Genesis Evangelion" Blu-ray collection. Other notable offers feature the M5 MacBook Air and more tech gadgets.

headline: Stop Killing Games Gains Momentum After Bill Passes California State Assembly Vote
summary: The "Stop Killing Games" movement achieved a significant legislative victory in California. A bill protecting games from being taken offline successfully passed the State Assembly. This milestone aims to preserve access to older and discontinued video games.

headline: Sturgeon tells BBC: I'm serving a sentence for crime I didn't commit
summary: Scotland's former First Minister, Nicola Sturgeon, spoke to the BBC. She claimed to be "serving a sentence" for a crime she denies committing. Sturgeon was visibly emotional discussing the SNP embezzlement scandal.

headline: Watch: Sturgeon says 'I will not apologise for crimes of my former husband'
summary: Nicola Sturgeon stated she won't apologize for her former husband's crimes. The ex-First Minister feels she's "serving a sentence" for an uncommitted crime. Her comments were made during a candid interview about her situation.

headline: Hundreds arrested in France after wild Champions League celebrations
summary: Hundreds were arrested in France following chaotic Champions League celebrations. Crowds celebrated PSG's victory over Arsenal, with some firing flares. Thousands of officers were deployed to control the widespread unrest.

headline: How Putin became master of the image
summary: The article explores Vladimir Putin's skillful image reinvention over the years. It traces his journey from a mysterious KGB agent to a wartime leader. Putin has consistently adapted his public persona to maintain power.
